descriptions.japanese: ティヴィーを倒してアップグレード。

descriptions.english: A random floor has +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]. At the end of combat, the front friendly unit on that floor gains +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity], +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] and +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] if there is [capacity] available (max 6[capacity]).
descriptions.french: Une salle aléatoire a +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]. À la fin du combat, l'allié en 1re ligne de cette salle gagne +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity], +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] et +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] si la [capacity] le permet.
descriptions.german: Ein zufälliger Raum hat +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]. Am Kampfende erhält die vorderste verbündete Einheit in diesem Raum +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity], +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] und +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health], wenn [capacity] verfügbar ist.
descriptions.russian: Случайная комната получает +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]. В конце боя передний союзник в комнате получает +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity], +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] и +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health], если позволяет [capacity].
descriptions.portuguese: Uma sala aleatória tem +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]. No final do combate, a unidade aliada na frente na sala ganha +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity], +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] e +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] se houver [capacity] disponível.
descriptions.chinese: 一个随机房间获得 +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]。战斗结束时，该房间若有可用 [capacity]，则前排友方单位获得 +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity]，+[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] 和 +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health]。
descriptions.spanish: Una sala aleatoria tiene +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]. Al final de la batalla, la primera unidad aliada de la sala añade +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity], +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] y +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] si hay [capacity] disponible.
descriptions.chinese_traditional: 一個隨機房間有+[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]。在戰鬥結束時，如果[capacity]可用，該房間的前排友方單位獲得+[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity]、+[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]和+[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]。
descriptions.korean: 무작위 객실 하나에 +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]이 부여됩니다. 전투 종료 시, 해당 객실의 [capacity]에 여유가 있다면 전열 아군 유닛 하나가 +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity], +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] 및 +[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]을 획득합니다.
descriptions.japanese: ランダムなルームに+[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier0.power][capacity]。が空いている場合、戦闘終了時にそのルーム内にいる味方ユニットが+[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonussize][capacity][capacity]、+[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]、+[effect0.upgrade.roommodifier1.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health]を得る。
